intro:
I couldn't find any information on a plant called "Othake callosum". It is possible that it is a lesser-known or misidentified plant.

However, I can suggest an alternative plant that matches the given name: "Orthosiphon callosum" (also known as Java tea or Misai kucing). 

Here is a paragraph about Orthosiphon callosum:

Orthosiphon callosum, also known as Java tea or Misai kucing, is a tropical plant species that has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine. The health benefits of Orthosiphon callosum include its ability to reduce blood pressure, alleviate urinary tract infections, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Orthosiphon callosum is used to make herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, with the most common preparations being decoctions made from the leaves, stems, and roots of the plant.
